overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player character traverses a sunlit elevated walkway, descends to a plaza where children play with drones, and enters a neon-lit covered market street with vendor stalls. The scene transitions from bright natural sunlight to artificial neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with futuristic city views

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated pedestrian walkway, observing the cityscape and passing outdoor seating areas

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle cruises overhead from left to right above the buildings

entered.detail: large red diagonal structural beam with white 03 marking attached to building
large vertical holographic advertisement display showing colorful graphics
metal and glass safety railing along the walkway edge with horizontal bars
futuristic benches with glowing blue accent lights underneath

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit elevated walkway in a futuristic city. The player walks forward past modern benches and glass railings, with a prominent red structural beam marked '03' on the left and holographic advertisements on the right. A flying vehicle passes overhead in the distance as pedestrians walk by.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending concrete ramp leading to lower plaza

events.description: leaving elevated walkway and beginning descent to lower plaza level
moving from direct sunlight into shadow cast by surrounding buildings

agents.ego_description: walking down the wide concrete ramp toward the lower plaza level, passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: wide concrete ramp with red painted edges leading downward
open plaza area with palm trees visible at bottom of ramp

segments.scene_description: The player leaves the elevated walkway and descends a wide concrete ramp. The lighting shifts from bright sun to shadow as the surroundings become more enclosed. The red structural beam and holographic billboards recede into the background as the lower plaza with palm trees comes into view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with palm trees and children playing

events.description: children playing with small drones become visible sitting on the plaza ground
approaching stairs leading down to covered market area

agents.ego_description: walking across the sunlit plaza past children playing on the ground with drone toys

notable_agents.action: children sitting on ground playing with small drones
child standing and operating a drone controller device

entered.detail: tall palm trees casting long shadows on the concrete plaza surface
stairway entrance leading down to covered market area with red railings

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the lower plaza level, an open sunlit area with palm trees. Children are sitting on the concrete playing with drones. The player walks past them toward a stairway entrance that leads down to a covered market, with the red structural beam now visible in the center background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market street with vendor stalls and neon lighting

events.description: entering covered market area from open plaza, enclosed by buildings overhead
ambient light shifts from natural sunlight to artificial neon and fluorescent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow market street browsing vendor stalls and passing shoppers

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind clothing stall arranging merchandise
pedestrian browsing goods at market stall

entered.detail: wooden market stall with folded clothing items and white mannequin torso
food preparation cart with blue neon lighting and cooking equipment
bright blue neon sign for Cirrus brand mounted on building wall
metal walkways pipes and industrial structures overhead with hanging lights

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered market street, transitioning from bright sunlight to artificial neon lighting. The narrow passage is lined with vendor stalls selling clothing and food. Neon signs including a prominent blue Cirrus sign illuminate the scene as the player walks past browsing shoppers and vendors under industrial overhead structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, sunlit elevated walkway down into the artificial glow of a neon-lit covered market. It begins by moving past modern benches and holographic advertisements on a high platform, where a flying vehicle passes overhead against the clear sky. As the camera descends a wide concrete ramp, the bright sunlight gives way to shadow and the open vistas recede, leading the viewer toward a lower plaza populated by palm trees and children playing with drones. The scene then shifts from the open plaza into a narrow stairway entrance, transitioning abruptly from natural light to a dense corridor of artificial illumination. Finally, the camera glides through the covered market street, passing vendor stalls and browsing shoppers under industrial structures and glowing blue neon signs.
